title: A timeline of learning, work, and delivery.
description: The flow is shaped like a personal career path: school, serious first projects, retail workflows, then operational products and publishing systems.

items.title: Software Engineering Student
items.summary: Built a foundation in fullstack development, APIs, responsive UI, version control, technical documentation, and system design.
details: Specialized in fullstack web development with PHP Laravel, RESTful APIs, Tailwind CSS, Bootstrap, and responsive interface implementation.
Explored Android Studio with Java and Kotlin, interactive frontend development with jQuery, and Arduino Uno fundamentals using C.
Practiced Git version control through GitHub and GitLab, interface planning in Figma, and structured project documentation.
Developed leadership habits as an extracurricular leader, including planning, task coordination, and team communication.

items.title: Junior Full Stack Web Developer
items.summary: Developed a POS backend with Laravel, integrated the Midtrans API, prepared ERD, DFD, and use case diagrams, and coordinated team progress.
details: Built backend modules for a POS system using PHP Laravel with a clean relational database structure.
Integrated Midtrans payment gateway flows for smoother transaction handling.
Prepared project blueprints from ERD to relational schema, DFD Level 0-2, and use case diagrams.
Coordinated daily and weekly tasks, facilitated progress reviews, and managed technical communication with mentors and the team.

items.title: IT Support / Developer
items.summary: Built Flowty Pay POS, barcode checkout, SME CRM integration, and migrated more than 500 inventory SKUs into Majoo.
details: Designed and developed the internal Flowty Pay POS workflow with Laravel and responsive frontend foundations.
Implemented barcode checkout that reduced average checkout time by around 20% and improved inventory accuracy.
Integrated CRM needs for SME customer data management and business process automation.
Led inventory data migration of more than 500 SKUs into Majoo with an accurate and seamless transition.

items.title: Fullstack Web Developer
items.summary: Developed company profiles, WordPress news sites, OJS 3.4 themes, critical troubleshooting workflows, and technical customer support.
details: Implemented and developed company profile websites and news-style WordPress experiences using custom theme and page builder workflows.
Designed and created dedicated Open Journal System 3.4 themes with custom CSS and Manuscript theme modification.
Handled OJS workflow customization to support scientific journal publishing standards.
Led troubleshooting, debugging, and advanced customer handling to maintain operational stability and uptime.
